description_es: Aprende a cargar y consultar datos básicos con HiveQL. Selecciona las primeras 5 filas de la tabla users.
description_en: Learn to load and query basic data with HiveQL. Select the first 5 rows from the users table.
initial_script:
-- Carga los datos de users.csv
-- Selecciona las primeras 5 filas

-- TODO: Escribe tu solución aquí
solution_script:
-- Crear tabla externa
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
  user_id INT,
  name STRING,
  age INT,
  country STRING,
  signup_date STRING
)
ROW FORMAT DELIMITED
FIELDS TERMINATED BY ','
STORED AS TEXTFILE
LOCATION '/datasets/'
TBLPROPERTIES ('skip.header.line.count'='1');

SELECT * FROM users LIMIT 5;
hints_es: Usa CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE para cargar CSV
Define el esquema con tipos de datos
Usa TBLPROPERTIES para saltar el header
hints_en: Use CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE to load CSV

description_es: Filtra usuarios mayores de 25 años.

initial_script:

-- TODO: Escribe tu solución aquí
solution_script:
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
  user_id INT,
  name STRING,
  age INT,
  country STRING,
  signup_date STRING
)
ROW FORMAT DELIMITED
FIELDS TERMINATED BY ','

hints_en: Make sure to create the table first

description_es: Cuenta cuántos usuarios hay por país.
description_en: Count how many users there are per country.
initial_script:
-- Cuenta usuarios por país

-- TODO: Escribe tu solución aquí
solution_script:
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
  user_id INT,
  name STRING,
  age INT,
  country STRING,
  signup_date STRING
)
ROW FORMAT DELIMITED
FIELDS TERMINATED BY ','
STORED AS TEXTFILE
LOCATION '/datasets/'
TBLPROPERTIES ('skip.header.line.count'='1');

SELECT country, COUNT(*) as total
FROM users
GROUP BY country;
hints_en: Give it an alias with AS

)
ROW FORMAT DELIMITED
FIELDS TERMINATED BY ','

SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY age DESC;
hints_es: DESC ordena de mayor a menor
ASC ordena de menor a mayor (por defecto)
hints_en: DESC sorts from high to low
ASC sorts from low to high (default)

description_es: Calcula la edad promedio por país.
description_en: Calculate the average age per country.
initial_script:
-- Calcula AVG(age) por país

-- TODO: Escribe tu solución aquí
solution_script:
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
  user_id INT,
  name STRING,
  age INT,
  country STRING,
  signup_date STRING
)
ROW FORMAT DELIMITED
FIELDS TERMINATED BY ','
STORED AS TEXTFILE
LOCATION '/datasets/'
TBLPROPERTIES ('skip.header.line.count'='1');

SELECT country, AVG(age) as avg_age
FROM users
GROUP BY country;
hints_es: Agrupa por country con GROUP BY
hints_en: Group by country with GROUP BY

description_es: Encuentra la edad máxima y mínima.

initial_script:

-- TODO: Escribe tu solución aquí
solution_script:
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
  user_id INT,
  name STRING,
  age INT,
  country STRING,
  signup_date STRING
)
ROW FORMAT DELIMITED
FIELDS TERMINATED BY ','
STORED AS TEXTFILE
LOCATION '/datasets/'
TBLPROPERTIES ('skip.header.line.count'='1');

SELECT MAX(age) as max_age, MIN(age) as min_age FROM users;
